title: Built Two Unicorns in 12 Years. The Rule Has Never Changed | Glean, Arvind Jain
summary: Arvind Jain, founder of Glean (valued at $7 billion), discusses his approach to building unicorn companies. He emphasizes focus and avoiding building products that competitors already execute well, rather than pursuing bigger models or better funding presentations.
